backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend types (PlayerProfile, SessionState, MatchResult, etc.) and the core canister logic for a pickleball session management app including player profiles, sessions, ratings, messaging, and match history.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—adding React Query hooks for hostAddPlayer/searchPlayers and adding an 'Add Player Manually' UI in HostSessionDashboard—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, page, hook, and utility in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'The Ball Club', mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, login, profile, session host/player, messages, history), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders the Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AllRoundsSchedul: Collapsible schedule component that displays all rounds of court assignments and waitlists from a client-side generated schedule, highlighting the current round and current player.
frontend/src/components/CourtAssignmentC: Displays a court assignment card showing two teams with player slots, guest badges, and optional score entry/submission UI for ranked sessions.
frontend/src/components/GameScheduleInfo: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header (navigation, logout) and footer, wrapping page content in a flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/LoadingGame.tsx: Renders an animated canvas-based pickleball mini-game (pong-style) as a loading screen with an optional message.
frontend/src/components/MatchResultSubmi: Displays a match result submission card allowing the host to select a match format and declare a winning team for a given court.
Shows a player's avatar, rating badge, and win/loss/win-rate statistics in a compact card layout.
frontend/src/components/SessionCodeDispl: Displays a shareable game session code with copy-to-clipboard and native share functionality.
frontend/src/components/SessionConfigFor: A React form component for configuring a pickleball game session, allowing users to set courts, date/time, venue, duration, game type (random, round robin, ladder, king/queen), and ranked mode.
frontend/src/components/WaitlistPanel.ts: A React component that displays a ranked waitlist of players, highlighting the current user and distinguishing guest players with badges and icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profile CRUD, session creation/retrieval, guest profiles, messaging, and a session code generator utility.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Outfit fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a pickleball-themed OKLCH color palette with light and dark mode CSS custom properties plus utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/errorHandling.ts: Provides utility functions to detect and classify IC canister errors (stopped, auth, network, session-not-found, duplicate player, invalid principal, host-only) and format user-friendly error messages for session loading and player-add failures.
frontend/src/lib/scheduler.ts: Implements a client-side fair round-robin scheduler for pickleball sessions, generating multi-round court assignments using a rotating queue of player indices, with a helper to resolve indices to player names.
frontend/src/lib/storage.ts: Manages localStorage persistence for player profiles, current session data, and per-session player name mappings, including helpers to clear stale or invalid session data.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports small utility functions for Tailwind class merging, clipboard copying, rating formatting, and principal ID shortening.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ConversationThread.ts: Renders a direct-message conversation thread between the current user and another player, supporting optimistic message sending and auto-scroll to the latest message.
frontend/src/pages/CreateSession.tsx: Page component for creating a new pickleball session, displaying a config form and, on success, showing the generated session code with a link to the host dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/GameHistory.tsx: Displays a user's match history with win/loss summary stats and a sorted list of completed matches, requiring authentication to view.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main home page showing a personalized greeting, active session chip, and navigation cards for hosting, joining, messaging, and profile actions.
Host dashboard for managing a pickleball session, including court assignments, waitlist, match result submission, and adding guest or registered players.
frontend/src/pages/JoinSession.tsx: Page for joining a game session by entering a host-provided code, saving the session locally and navigating to the session view on success.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page offering Internet Identity sign-in or guest access, storing the auth choice in sessionStorage and redirecting accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesInbox.tsx: Inbox page listing the user's conversations sorted by most recent message, with navigation to individual conversation threads.
frontend/src/pages/PlayerSessionView.tsx: React page that displays a player's view of a badminton session, showing court assignments, waitlist, and full round schedule using a fair scheduling algorithm. Combines registered and guest players into a unified list for display.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: React page for initial profile creation supporting both authenticated users (via Internet Identity) and guests. Saves profile data to the backend and localStorage, then redirects to home.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileView.tsx: React page for viewing and editing the current user's profile, loading data from the backend or localStorage fallback. Supports inline editing with save/cancel controls.
frontend/src/pages/PublicProfile.tsx: React page that displays a read-only public profile for any player by principal ID, showing stats, bio, and work field. Authenticated non-owner viewers see a message button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Outfit), oklch-based color tokens (primary, sidebar, court, chart, etc.), border radii, and box shadows, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'The Ball Club' multiplayer game platform, recording existing implemented features (React Query hooks, host dashboard add-player UI) and pending feature requests (backend host-add-player and player-search functions).
